site.title: Azure OpenAI to OpenAI on Amazon Bedrock Cookbook
site.description: A practical engineering walkthrough for migrating an Azure OpenAI workload to OpenAI on Amazon Bedrock.

pages.title: Overview
pages.description: What you will migrate and how to use the cookbook.

pages.title: Step 0. Freeze the workflow contract
pages.description: Capture the operational behavior that must survive the migration.

pages.title: Step 1. Map Azure services to AWS
pages.description: Translate the Azure production shape into AWS services.

pages.title: Step 2. Parameterize configuration
pages.description: Move model IDs, endpoints, and resource names into environment variables.

pages.title: Step 3. Move policy documents to S3
pages.description: Copy the policy corpus from Blob Storage to S3 without losing citation continuity.

pages.title: Step 4. Rebuild retrieval
pages.description: Re-index policy sections in OpenSearch or Bedrock Knowledge Bases.

pages.title: Step 5. Move operational state
pages.description: Move request, vendor, approval, and audit records from Cosmos DB to DynamoDB.

pages.title: Step 6. Switch generation to Bedrock
pages.description: Call OpenAI on Amazon Bedrock while preserving the structured output contract.

pages.title: Step 7. Run golden request validation
pages.description: Compare Azure and AWS outputs for the same procurement request.

pages.title: Step 8. Cut over safely
pages.description: Route production traffic after the workflow, evidence, and audit trail match.

pages.title: Appendix: Public Release Checklist
pages.description: Scrub private identifiers and package the repo for public sharing.
